---
title: "Robbin Bouwmeester"
description: "Postdoctoral researcher, deep learning for retention time prediction"
image: ../assets/images/robbin.jpg
order: 1
orcid: "https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6807-7029"
---

## About

Research focus: deep learning models for peptide property prediction, with a specialisation in LC retention time and transfer learning across experimental setups.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6807-7029)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
